advancements.maid_mana_source.disable_al: Forbid the maid from charging all blocks
chat_bubbles.maid_mana_source.idle.0: Nothing to do for now, awaiting Master's next order anytime～
chat_bubbles.maid_mana_source.idle.1: Full of mana, please don't waste it, Master (≧∀≦)ゞ
chat_bubbles.maid_mana_source.idle.2: All filled up! Now we can use more mana, tee-hee～
chat_bubbles.maid_mana_source.idle.3: Charging complete! The Mana Source is ready for action, Master!
chat_bubbles.maid_mana_source.working.0: Master's needs are my motivation! Rest assured and leave it to me～
chat_bubbles.maid_mana_source.working.1: Leave it to me, this is what I'm best at~
chat_bubbles.maid_mana_source.working.2: Found an empty Mana Source! Watch me fill it up with mana!
chat_bubbles.maid_mana_source.working.3: My intuition tells me this thing is very useful for Master ヾ(•ω•`)o
task.maid_mana_source.mana_source.desc: Let the maid become the source of mana
tooltip.maid_mana_source.source_list.des: Let the maid know how to arrange the charging of mana source
